description: Design a professional User Persona Card for 'Penny Parker' in draw.io Desktop using the persona details in '~/Desktop/persona_data.txt' and the profile photo at '~/Desktop/penny.jpg'. The card should feature a main container with the photo in the top-left and a header next to it for the name 'Penny Parker' and role 'Senior Project Manager'. Below the header, implement a two-column layout with Bio and Demographics on the left and Goals and Frustrations on the right. At the bottom, include a 'Personality' section with three visual sliders (horizontal lines with circle handles) representing Introvert-Extrovert (handle near right), Analytical-Creative (handle near left), and Tech-Savvy (handle near right). Group all elements of the card and save the file to '~/Desktop/persona_card.drawio' and export it to '~/Desktop/persona_card.png'.
